privileged_info_summary: The utility_bill_analysis task uses synthetic data with 12 months of 2023 utility bills (January 15 - December 14). Data includes 4 columns: Bill Date, Usage (kWh), Bill Amount ($), and Reading Type. Billing periods vary between 28-32 days. Two readings are marked as 'Estimated' (March and October); remainder are 'Actual'. Usage shows clear seasonal pattern with summer peak: June 1050 kWh, July 1180 kWh (peak), August 1220 kWh. Winter months average ~850 kWh. Average monthly usage across all 12 months is 943.3 kWh.
